supervisor.reason: The new scope is complete: run and resume now support a total iteration budget, default loop runs to 50 total attempts, and focused plus local smoke validation passed.

bootstrap.goal: Add user-facing max-iteration loop control, default it to 50 total attempts, and stop Dormammu as soon as development is approved.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume after the max-iteration loop-control slice. Dormammu now supports a 50-attempt default budget, explicit max-iteration overrides, eager exit on approval, and guarded resume behavior when the budget is exhausted.

items.text: Phase 1. Review loop-run and resume semantics to map a user-facing max-iteration budget onto the existing retry model safely
Phase 2. Add --max-iterations to loop commands and default the total attempt budget to 50 when users do not set a loop budget explicitly
Phase 3. Preserve immediate Dormammu exit on supervisor approval and prevent resume from running again after the total iteration budget is spent
Phase 4. Add focused tests and docs for default budget, explicit iteration limits, resume overrides, and early exit on completion
Phase 5. Run automated validation and a local smoke test under ~/samba/test/dormammu-max-iterations-smoke

next_action: Prepare a commit for the validated max-iteration loop-control change, or extend the operator UX around loop-budget reporting and resume guidance.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
This slice targets loop-control behavior across run and resume.
Loop commands now accept --max-iterations, and run defaults to 50 total attempts when no loop budget is provided.
Supervisor approval still exits Dormammu immediately even when remaining iteration budget exists.

Focused validation passed through `python3 -m unittest tests.test_cli`, `python3 -m unittest tests.test_loop_runner`, `python3 -m unittest tests.test_config`, and `python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_script`.
Local smoke validation passed in `~/samba/test/dormammu-max-iterations-smoke` for default-50 eager exit and explicit run/resume iteration control.
